motif.name: prime_row
motif.notes: Rhythm corrected: original 11 values summed to 7.0 beats, not a multiple of the 4-beat bar (_check_bar_alignment rejected it). Fixed by extending the final note (the row's 12th and final pitch, interval -9) from 1.0 to 2.0 beats -- now 8.0 beats (2 bars), preserving all 11 original intervals and 10 of 11 original durations. Extending the row's completion note fits its own logic: the arrival of the final pitch is a real structural event in a twelve-tone row, worth landing on.
